description: From the manufacturer Calling all Harry Potter super-fans! Are you ready for the next Harry Potter adventure with the ultimate Seek The Snitch? Non-stop fun! Race around the Quidditch Pitch and be the first to catch the Golden Snitch. Play as either Harry, Ron, Hermione or Luna Dodge the Rogue Bludger, outwit your opponents with special Quidditch tricks.... and seek the snitch! Family friendly Fun for all ages from 8 years old upwards for 2 or more players. Looking for a fun Harry Potter gift? This board game is a popular Harry Potter gift for kids... its great fun for the whole family too! Whats In The Box? 1x Quidditch pitch boardgame 1x dice 1x Rogue Bludger 55 playing cards 4x Seekers Instruction booklet
